description: Egészítsd ki a mondatokat a helyes szóval: can vagy can't.

items.sentence: I ______ speak English, but I cannot speak Spanish.
______ you help me with this problem, please?
He is a driver. He ______ drive a car very well.
I am sorry, I ______ come to the meeting today. I am busy.
She ______ swim. She goes to the pool every weekend.
______ I have a coffee and a glass of water, please?
The laptop is broken. It ______ start.
______ you spell your name for me, please?
They are poor. They ______ buy a big house.
Open the window, please. ______ you reach it?
Mark is an IT expert. He ______ write code very fast.
My grandmother is 85. She ______ see very well without her glasses.
______ I use your telephone for a minute? My battery is dead.
This box is too heavy. We ______ lift it together.
______ you tell me where the office is, please?
The restaurant is closed, so we ______ eat dinner here.
She is busy right now. She ______ talk to you.
______ I open the window? It is very hot here.
He is fluent. He ______ speak Slovak and English.
I don't have my keys, so I ______ open the front door.
______ you hear that noise outside? What is it?
The child is very small. He ______ drive a car.
Excuse me, ______ you say that again, please?
We have a lot of time. We ______ watch a movie before the meeting.
I ______ find my pen. Is it on your desk?
______ they play tennis? Yes, they go to the court every Saturday.
The screen is dark. I ______ read the text.
______ you swim across this big river? No, it is too dangerous.
He is happy because he ______ start his new job tomorrow.
I am poor. I ______ buy this expensive phone.
______ I see your passport, please?
The door is open. You ______ come inside.
She ______ play football today because her leg is broken.
______ you understand this difficult code?
We ______ have a meeting today because the manager is sick.
He is a good singer. He ______ sing very beautifully.
______ I have a clean glass, please? This one is dirty.
My car has no petrol. It ______ move.
______ you help us find our dog? He is in the garden.
I am sorry, I ______ understand you. Can you speak slowly?
They are rich. They ______ buy any car they want.
______ we start the test now, teacher?
This phone is great. Its battery ______ last for two days.
He ______ come to the cafe because he is working late.
______ you open this bottle for me? It is very hard.
The birds are free. They ______ fly high in the sky.
I have a lot of work. I ______ play football with you tonight.
______ you speak English? Yes, a little bit.
This computer is old and slow. It ______ run this game.
______ I sit here next to you? Is this chair empty?
